default.text: Hi, I'm interested in your Taoist services. Could you tell me more?

homepage.text: Hi, I just visited your site and I'm curious about your Taoist offerings. Can you guide me?

services.text: Hi, I'm interested in your ritual services at Longhu Mountain. Could you share more details?

services-ritual.text: Hi, I'd like to know more about your ritual services. What options are available?

services-karmic-release.text: Hi, I'm interested in the karmic release ritual. Can you tell me how it works?

services-pet-memorial.text: Hi, I'd like to inquire about the pet memorial ceremony.

services-space-energy.text: Hi, I'm interested in space energy alignment. What does it involve?

divination.text: Hi, I'm curious about Qi Men divination. Could you explain how it works?

divination-qi-men-reading.text: Hi, I'd like to book a Qi Men Dun Jia reading. What information do you need from me?

feng-shui.text: Hi, I'm interested in Feng Shui consultation for my home/office. Can you help?

shop.text: Hi, I'd like to browse your spiritual products. Can you recommend something for me?

shop-talisman.text: Hi, I'm interested in purchasing a talisman. Which one would you recommend for my situation?

shop-qi-men-deck.text: Hi, I'd like to learn more about the Qi Men card deck.

shop-talisman-decor.text: Hi, I'm interested in the talisman decor items.

packages.text: Hi, I'd like to order a ritual package. Could you guide me through the options?

about.text: Hi, I'd like to connect with Master Chen Wei. Can you tell me more about his background?

learn.text: Hi, I'm interested in learning about Taoist philosophy and practices. Where should I start?

culture.text: Hi, I'd like to explore Taoist culture further. Can you recommend resources?

blog.text: Hi, I just read your blog and I'm interested in learning more.

community.text: Hi, I'd like to join your Taoist community. How can I get involved?

contact.text: Hi, I have a question about your services. Can you help me?

faq.text: Hi, I've read your FAQ but still have a question. Can you help?

__campaign_banner.text: Hi, I saw your banner on the {{source}} page and I'm interested.

__campaign_minimal.text: Hi, I'd like a quick question answered about {{source}}.

quiz-result-protection.text: Hi, I just completed the Energy Guidance Assessment and my result is Protection. I'd like to learn more about the Personal Protection talisman.

quiz-result-health.text: Hi, I just completed the Energy Guidance Assessment and my result is Renewal. I'd like to learn more about the Health & Vitality talisman.

quiz-result-love.text: Hi, I just completed the Energy Guidance Assessment and my result is Connection. I'd like to learn more about the Love & Harmony talisman.

quiz-result-wealth.text: Hi, I just completed the Energy Guidance Assessment and my result is Abundance. I'd like to learn more about the Prosperity & Flow talisman.

__campaign_quiz.text: Hi, I just completed the Energy Guidance Assessment on your site and I'd like guidance.
